name: cx-orchestrator
description: Orchestrate a CX1 CodexApp thread with a controlled CX2 CodexCLI worker through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Run CX2 CodexCLI tasks from a CX1 CodexApp thread.
interface.longDescription: Provides a CX1 orchestration skill and a CX2 Controller MCP server that starts, monitors, stops, and records CodexCLI CX2 tasks with full logs.
defaultPrompt: Start as CX1 for this repo using CX Orchestrator. Decide and show the CX2 runtime before each CX2 task.
Prepare a CX2 task prompt for my review, including model, reasoning effort, and speed.
Check the latest CX2 task result.
